name: La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton
address: Sunset Town, An Thới, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam
description:
La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton

Hàng loạt dịch vụ được La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton cung cấp đảm bảo tất cả du khách tận dụng được tối đa kỳ nghỉ của họ. Dễ dàng cập nhật mọi thông tin liên lạc của quý khách với Wi-Fi miễn phí của khách sạn.
Dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng có thể hỗ trợ các nhu cầu của quý khách. Cho những kỳ nghỉ dài hơn hoặc bất cứ khi nào quý khách cần, dịch vụ giặt là giữ cho những bộ trang phục du lịch yêu thích của quý khách luôn sạch sẽ và sẵn sàng.
Các tiện ích trong phòng bao gồm dịch vụ tại phòng và dọn phòng hằng ngày, vì vậy bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Khách sạn cấm hút thuốc hoàn toàn để đảm bảo bầu không khí trong lành.
Các phòng tại La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton được thiết kế để mang đến sự thoải mái. Cho sự thoải mái cho quý khách, một số phòng tại khách sạn được trang bị điều hòa. Các phòng tại La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton có các đặc điểm thiết kế đặc biệt như một ban công hoặc sân hiên. Các tiện nghi giải trí trong phòng có sẵn trong một số phòng và bao gồm phát trực tuyến video trong phòng và ti-vi.
Khách sạn cũng cung cấp nước đóng chai, tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống và trà hòa tan cho khách trong một số phòng. Biết rằng đồ dùng phòng tắm đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc tăng mức độ hài lòng của khách, khách sạn cung cấp khăn tắm, áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa trong một số phòng chọn lọc.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Bắt đầu mỗi buổi sáng tại La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton với bữa sáng hấp dẫn được phục vụ trong khuôn viên. Một loạt các lựa chọn ăn uống tiện lợi và ngon miệng đang chờ quý khách tại khách sạn, bất cứ khi quý khách quý khách cảm thấy đói. Một khi đến đó, hãy nhớ ghé qua quán bar để tận hưởng một số thú vui ban đêm ngay tại chỗ.
La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton cho phép quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian của mình! Khi ở đó, quý khách có thể tận hưởng vô số cơ sở vật chất giải trí được cung cấp cho tất cả khách nghỉ. Chiều chuộng và nuông chiều bản thân với một chuyến ghé qua spa.
Bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của quý khách đúng điệu bằng việc tắm mát trong bể bơi. Khám phá trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn để giữ sức khỏe và săn chắc trong kỳ nghỉ.

sample_comments.text: Phòng có view nhìn hoàn hảo, đặc biệt thấy biển và có thể ngắm pháo hoa. Bữa ăn sáng ngon và nhân viên thân thiện. Chất lượng phòng tốt. Chắc chắn sẽ quay lại.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn siêu xịn sò
sample_comments.response:
Thân gửi chị Nguyet,

Cảm ơn chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá 5 sao dành cho La Festa Phu Quoc.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết chị đã có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ và yêu thích khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp từ phòng nghỉ, đặc biệt là tầm nhìn hướng biển cùng những màn trình diễn pháo hoa đặc sắc. Thật tuyệt khi chất lượng phòng nghỉ, bữa sáng và sự thân thiện của đội ngũ nhân viên đã góp phần mang đến cho chị những trải nghiệm trọn vẹn.

Những lời động viên của chị là nguồn khích lệ rất ý nghĩa đối với toàn bộ đội ngũ. Chúng tôi vô cùng trân trọng sự yêu mến của chị dành cho La Festa Phu Quoc.

Cảm ơn chị một lần nữa và chúng tôi rất mong sẽ sớm được chào đón chị quay trở lại trong thời gian tới.

Trân trọng,
Justin Kim
Tổng Quản lý
sample_comments.room_type: Family Room with Balcony and Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Mọi thứ đều tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text:
Mình đã đặt phòng theo lời giới thiệu của bạn bè và thực sự rất hài lòng. Mặc dù không được bố trí ở tòa nhà chính hơi bất tiện một chút, nhưng riêng tư và phòng rất rộng rãi nên mình cũng chấp nhận được. Nhân viên rất thân thiện, chất lượng giường tuyệt vời, nhưng mà bộ lọc vòi hoa sen thì rất cần thiết.

Xung quanh có nhiều điểm tham quan và thực sự không có cảm giác Đông Nam Á. Chỉ có điều nhà hàng đi kèm thì không được tốt lắm. Mình đã đặt buffet để xem pháo hoa nhưng không có nhiều món ăn và hương vị cũng không đặc sắc, giá cũng cao nữa. Nhà ăn sáng không nằm ở tòa nhà chính mà theo kiểu gọi món, khá là sạch sẽ, nhưng số lượng món thì ít. Mình cũng đã sử dụng quầy bar trên tầng mái nhưng nhân viên không nói tiếng Anh tốt lắm. Ngoài những điều đó ra thì mình thực sự rất hài lòng và việc giao tiếp với nhân viên qua ứng dụng cũng rất tiện lợi!!
sample_comments.title: Điều kiện chỗ ở, vị trí, phục vụ đều rất tốt!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Soyoon,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review following your recent stay with us.

We are truly delighted to know that you had an overall enjoyable experience, particularly appreciating the spacious room, the comfort of our bedding, as well as the kindness of our team. It is also wonderful to hear that you found the surrounding area interesting and the communication via our app convenient throughout your stay.

At the same time, we regret to learn that certain aspects did not fully meet your expectations. Your comments regarding the dining experience, including the buffet and breakfast offerings, as well as your visit to the rooftop bar, have been noted. We understand how these moments can influence the overall impression, and your feedback has been shared with the relevant teams for further attention.

We also appreciate you highlighting the room assignment and facilities, including your note regarding the shower filter. Such details are valuable for

sample_comments.negatives: Nhân viên hơi thiếu nhiệt tình, hỏi mới trả lời chứ không tự bắt chuyện với khách hàng

sample_comments.text: Nhân viên rất lịch sự và chu đáo, phòng rất đẹp và sạch, view biển tuyệt vời! Ks rất rộng, cùng tầng nhưng đi từ phòng này tới phòng kia mỏi chân luôn :-) Lần sau rút kinh nghiệm dặn các phòng gần nhau. Chắc chắn sẽ quay lại nơi đây! Cảm ơn La Festa
sample_comments.title: Hoàn hảo
sample_comments.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã dành tình cảm cho đội ngũ nhân viên và không gian của La Festa. Dù đi 'mỏi chân' một chút nhưng hy vọng những trải nghiệm tại đây đã để lại cho bạn những kỷ niệm đẹp. Rất mong được chào đón bạn trở lại trong một ngày gần nhất!

Best Regards,
Justin Kim
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Sống động, vui tươi và nhiều bất ngờ tích cực. Ẩm thực ở thị trấn hoàng hôn đặc biệt tệ, vì vậy nên ăn tối ở các nhà hàn

sample_comments.negatives: Phòng hơi nhỏ và không có một ngôn ngữ kiến trúc tổng thể tốt như JW Mariott hay tiện nghi như The Regent. Nhưng hai show pháo hoa lúc 7:45 và 9:00 khiến chúng tôi vô cùng hài lòng.

sample_comments.text:
Vì là mùa mưa nên không đông đúc. 
Nếu bạn tìm một vị trí tuyệt vời và phòng sạch sẽ, thì nhất định phải đến đây!! 
Hồ bơi rộng và nước sạch. 
Có bãi biển và cầu ở phía trước, cảnh đẹp.

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã đặt phòng với tầm nhìn ra biển, từ ban công có thể xem được toàn bộ pháo hoa haha. Quy mô lớn nên không cảm thấy tiền bỏ ra là lãng phí. Trong chợ đêm cũng có siêu thị. Vé xem buổi biểu diễn Kiss of the Sea còn miễn phí nữa nên càng tuyệt.

sample_comments.title: Đó là ngững tác phẩm nghệ thuật giàu cảm xúc
sample_comments.positives: Tôi thích thiết kế kiến trúc của khách sạn. Sự tinh tế tỉ mỉ từng chi tiết kgieens cho khách sạn đẹp sang trọng từng cm. Vị trí bể bơi vô cùng lãnh mạn và lộng lẫy vào buổi tối khiến khách sạn như một biểu tượng của thị trấn Hoàng Hôn. Tôi đã từng ở Mariott Phú Quốc tháng 11 năm 2024 đối với tôi đây là 2 khách sạn đẹp xuất sắc về sự lãng mạn khiến tôi sủng sốt. Ngoài ra ẩm thực Lafesta tinh tế và hấp dẫn cũng như đẹp mắt khiến tôi vô cùng ấn tượng và không thể quên được các loại bánh thơm ngon hảo hạng của khách sạn. Tôi chưa bao giờ được thưởng thức những loại bánh ngon và đẹp đến như thế!
sample_comments.negatives: Lễ tân làm việc chưa thực sự linh hoạt lắm. Khi tôi đặt phòng qua boking nên có những loại phòng tôi chưa thực sự hiểu . Khác với chính sách ở các khách sạn khác nếu được nâng cấp đa số họ miễn phí . Còn Lafesta thì kể cả có phòng trống nâng hạng lên hướng biển . Tôi vẫn phải trả phí . Đó là điều khách sạn chưa lấy lòng khách hàng. Một tín đồ đam mê du lịch trong nước như tôi.

sample_comments.title: 친절하지만 불편한 가고싶지 않은 곳
sample_comments.text: 예약 안내사항과 호텔정책이 상이하여 예약확정도 힘들었는데 현장 체크인도 매우 힘들었고 체크인에 한시간 가량이 소요되어서 시작부터 기분이 나빴습니다. 왜 이렇게 체크인이 불편하냐고 문의했더니 타사이트를 통해 예약해서 어쩔수 없다는 식으로 답을 하더군요. 시설은 쾌적하고 선셋타운 중심에 있어서 관광하기 편리했지만 내돈주고 가고싶지 않은 불쾌한 곳입니다. 참고로 와이파이도 유료입니다.

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay at La Festa Phu Quoc. We truly appreciate your thoughtful comments, and while we are pleased to hear that you found our facilities pleasant and the location convenient for exploring vibrant Sunset Town, we regret to learn that some aspects of your arrival experience left you feeling disappointed.

While our Team Members did their utmost to assist you, we sincerely apologize for any miscommunication or delay you experienced during the check-in process, and we greatly appreciate your patience and understanding. Please note that your comments have been shared with the relevant departments as part of our commitment to consistently enhance the quality of our service.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed with the service
sample_comments.positives: Facility, breakfast, swimming pool
sample_comments.negatives:
Dear Hotel Management Team,
My husband and I were staying at your hotel for 5 nights. It was wonderful time we had together. Everything was on the perfect track. Breakfasts were super delicious, service staff was very helpful and really enjoyed the show on the Kiss Bridge which was provided to us as a gift from the hotel side.
On out last day we decided to purchase a silky bath robe as a memory from this hotel. On the reception during the check out we asked to sell the robe to us. And young lady on reception said that it is OK to purchase this and even offered us a brand new from the stock. We were so glad and happy to get this! But it was such a disappointment to check it once we arrived to the airport that she put as completely old and teared robe.((( It was shorter like someone cut it before and all knits were hanging out of the robe!! I was so disappointed as it was quite expensive. Unfortunately we could not get back to the hotel as were about to leave the island. I do not know why that lady did that but it was very negative experience which covered all positive things there. ((( Would not recommend this hotel to anyone.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Beach access only opens from 630am to 5pm

청결도에 높은 점수를 주셔서 감사합니다. 다만, 안전과 정비를 위해 제한된 해변 이용 시간(06:30~17:00)으로 불편을 드려 정말 죄송합니다. 고객님의 의견을 수렴하여 운영 시간 개선을 적극 검토하고, 시설 서비스 강화에 힘쓰겠습니다. 소중한 피드백 감사합니다.

sample_comments.title: Great location, but poor service and unclear room policies.
sample_comments.positives: Location only
sample_comments.negatives:
Disappointing Stay

The location is excellent, but that's the only positive. Service and communication were very poor.

We waited over 3 hours for our rooms and were placed in separate rooms / buildings despite prior requests. Booking information is misleading: stating that a child under 12 stays free does NOT mean an extra bed is included. You must either pay extra for a bed (if the room allows it) or the child is expected to share the same bed, which was unacceptable.

We paid for a balcony ocean-view room, but it was unusable due to construction, with noise all night from construction and furniture moving.

Staff and management were rude and dismissive, and breakfast was chaotic with no seating.

sample_comments.title: Worst hotel. Book only after reading this
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is at sunset town, there is no good restaurant around, you will get continental cuisine only. 
They never give early checkin you can read other reviews too, incase you want they ask for half day room rent.
Checkin is 3 pm and Pool closes at 6:30pm, kids play area closes at 5pm, all other major amenities closes by 7pm. Only restaurant is open until 11pm. 
I booked king capri suite but did not like the room. Had very bad drainage issue.
If you compare any other 5 star hotel nearby, any other will be better than this.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel with amazing location
sample_comments.positives: The location is amazing in the heart of the sunset town and you get free access to the kissing bridge and fire show
sample_comments.negatives: There was limited options of food near the area

sample_comments.title: Horrible hotel premises layout
sample_comments.text:
Honest opinion. The hotel has good breakfast but everything else do not do justice to the value for money aspect.

Staff at counter seems not too friendly when processing our check in. The facilities like swimming pool is not readily accessible. You have to walk quite a distance, open multiple doors, cross a bridge with redundant stairs to reach it. Swimming pool towels were asked to return at pool area after use. This is something not acceptable as our young kids have to bear with the shivers, walking through the air-conditioned corridors to our room, causing them to catch a cold.

Room with ocean view was a total flop as it was blocked by the front buildings with only partial view in between where we can only see part of the fireworks display from the Symphony of the Sea.

Only recommend to those who love great breakfast and don't mind walking in a maze.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay at La Festa Phu Quoc. We are truly grateful for your kind words about our breakfast offering --- it's always encouraging to know that certain aspects of your visit met your expectations.

That said, we would like to sincerely apologize for the areas in which we fell short. sample_comments.title: Perfect for sunset & fireworks!
sample_comments.positives:
Beautiful sunset + fireworks everyday.
Friendly staff + good location. 

There is also a shuttle to take us to Khem Beach every hour which was very convenient!
sample_comments.negatives:
There is not much in the breakfast buffet.

The check-in was quite slow - took us about 40min to be checked in (this is from after the reception got all our info and told us to wait to be called).

To get to the hotel/restaurant/gym - it's quite a walk from the hotel room. There's a connection bridge, but for some reason, it's only accessible via bridge although there are gates. A bit confusing for some guests.

sample_comments.title: The worst room quality, but good view and good few staffs.
sample_comments.text:
The worst room quality, but good view and good few staffs.
Visiting 2nd time on La Festa in Phu Quoc.

Room - The worst from major hotel chains. I don't know why it is named Hilton. Which hotel has other people's pee smell from the toilet, need to spray perfume 2 times in 1 day during stays... cannot be washed away from housekeeping...
View - The best view for sunset and fireworks.
Staff - Few people were professional, some were really bad.
Food - Better than last year, noddle/desert are okay. but fruit quality was not that good then other hotels.

The best view and atmosphere, fine breakfast and quality, The street has more stores and people than a last year, which is convenient to buy and enjoy various food.

However, we suffer a huge problem for the room and recipetion staff "Anh". It makes us not to be relaxed in this hotel.

We have noise and privacy problem on the 1st room, and 2nd room has two problems.
Toilet has a pee smell which needs to spray perfume 2 times a day. It seems from drain from toilet. It makes very uncomfortable to smell everyday for other people's pee smell from the room.

Bath room door cannot be closed due to issue, it makes water out from the bath room place.
Anh from recipetion staff persuaded us to move for taking shower from far away from our room.. for 3 times even we have already said not to move for shower.

Manager Linh VIT from the recipetion has been helped on the night till late for checking an issue, owning this regarding the problems to discuss with me night and day time.
That is what we expect from the name of Hilton. Linh has shown dedication and responsibility for this. Although it takes some time to fix the issues, by helping from her, it has been remarked on a good vacation from La Festa Hilton.

sample_comments.title: Extremely Disappointing Experience - Wouldn't Recommend
sample_comments.text:
We checked in for a one-night stay to celebrate my birthday, and the experience was nothing short of disappointing. Despite booking a room with a balcony and a view of the Kiss Bridge, we were informed at reception that no balcony rooms were available. After waiting for nearly two hours, we were finally given a room --- but even that had only a partial view, blocked by another structure right in front of the balcony.

While the room was being prepared, we went to the pool and requested the staff to keep our luggage in the room. On returning after a few hours, we found all our luggage lying at the reception --- wet --- and had to wait another 15 minutes with our 4-year-old to finally get the key and move to the room.

Adding to the disappointment, there was major construction going on at the property. The noise continued till late in the evening and started again early in the morning, ruining any chance of rest. The pool bar and beach bar were both non-functional, and the breakfast had no vegetarian or Indian-friendly non-veg options at all.

For the price we paid, this was an extremely frustrating and unpleasant experience. Definitely not worth the money, and I would not recommend this property to anyone.

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback with us and for choosing La Festa Phu Quoc to celebrate such a special occasion. We truly appreciate the opportunity to welcome you, and your comments are important in helping us better understand our guests' experiences and continuously improve our service.

We are sincerely sorry to learn about the inconveniences you encountered during your stay, especially during what should have been a memorable birthday celebration. Please know that your feedback has been shared with the relevant teams for review, so improvements can be made to support a more attentive and seamless arrival experience.

Regarding the noise that affected your stay, the disturbances originate from external construction works taking place in Sunset Town, outside of the resort's management. Personal was non high qualifier (not everywhere

I am a Diamond Member of Accor and other Hotels groups, I wish Là Festa will find better Admin.

sample_comments.title: Five Days in La Festa with very realistic hotel exiting experience
sample_comments.text:
I booked 5 rooms for my family for 5 days. During checkout at the hotel lobby at 12:00, my wife politely asked if we could extend one or two rooms until 1 or 2 p.m., as our flight was in the late afternoon, and we were traveling with my 85-year-old mother.

The receptionist, however, responded curtly: 'This is NOT possible,' before immediately gesturing for the next person in line to step forward.

While I fully understand that granting an extension is at the hotel's discretion, I believe a five-star hotel should handle such situations with greater courtesy. Politeness and empathy, even when declining a request, leave a lasting impression --- especially for departing guests.

All was good until this bad exiting experience.

Another feedback is the gym is poorly maintained. The service at the swimming pools was very good though.

sample_comments.title: Fireworks Viewing Spot
sample_comments.text: This is a great spot for fireworks. I stayed on the 5th floor, and from the balcony, I could see the Kiss Bridge and enjoy the fireworks from two shows that take place at night. The breakfast was neat but not abundant, and while it wasn't particularly delicious, it was average. The seafood buffet for dinner was quite disappointing. The lobsters were too small, and the seafood didn't taste particularly good. The afternoon tea available at the café right next to the lobby was nice. The two-person set had a large portion, perfect for three adult women, and it was tasty. The hotel was built while preserving the hill shape, so the flow was a bit inconvenient. There was a very shallow threshold at the door where the elevator leads to the breakfast area and pool, which made it easy to trip. The accommodation was a duplex structure, making it hard to go up and down, but the bed was comfortable and the interior was clean. I plan to revisit with the kids.

sample_comments.title: Sales are severe.
sample_comments.text: The hotel entrance was exotic, and the welcome drink was nice. Although it took a long time to check in, I was willing to bear that much. However, during check-in, the staff kept asking if I wanted to upgrade to an ocean view. It was about 50,000 won, and since I was on vacation, I agreed, but then they suggested upgrading to a balcony room instead, claiming it was better for viewing fireworks. I had already booked a room, so I felt put off by their persistent sales pitch and decided to stick with my original room. This commercial attitude was not very pleasant. However, all the facilities were clean, and the staff members were all friendly. Especially during afternoon tea, they ensured we could sit in the best spots first, and it was a very enjoyable experience for the price. The pool was spacious and nice. I was looking forward to breakfast, and it had a slightly unique layout compared to other places. When you go further inside, there is more food, but it felt a bit more complicated compared to other hotel breakfast locations where everything is visible at a glance. They recommended trying the seafood rice noodle soup a lot, and I understood why; it was incredibly delicious, something I couldn't find elsewhere. Unfortunately, I didn't find the other dishes particularly tasty, which was disappointing. There is a terrace inside the lobby where you can look outside, and many women come out to take photos. I took a few shots, and they turned out really well, so I recommend taking a picture at sunset! The buildings, fountain, and various sculptures in front of the hotel all look beautiful in photos, so it would be great to take home some stunning pictures!
sample_comments.response:
Dear MR. Taejin,

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your stay at La Festa Phu Quoc.

We sincerely apologize if the room upgrade suggestions during check-in caused any discomfort. Your comments have been noted and shared with our Team Members to ensure a more considerate and guest-focused approach.

We are pleased to know you appreciated the cleanliness, friendly staff, afternoon tea experience, pool, and the beautiful sunset views. We also value your feedback regarding breakfast and will continue working to enhance the overall experience.

We hope to welcome you back for a more seamless and enjoyable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Justin Kim
General Manager

sample_comments.title: einfach perfekt
sample_comments.positives:
Das Hotel, eine frische Bereicherung der Luxushotellerie, definiert Eleganz neu und bietet ein herausragendes Maß an Luxus. Die Professionalität und Hilfsbereitschaft des Personals sind beispielhaft und gewährleisten einen außergewöhnlichen Gästeservice. Die Zimmer überzeugen durch ihre Großzügigkeit, tadellose Sauberkeit und eine perfekte Ausstattung, die keine Wünsche offen lässt.

Das Frühstücksangebot hat mit seiner Vielfalt und Qualität die Erwartungen nicht nur erfüllt, sondern übertroffen. Die Swimmingpool-Anlage und der dazugehörige Strandbereich zeichnen sich durch ihre Einzigartigkeit aus und bieten ein unvergessliches Erholungserlebnis.

In Anbetracht der vielen Hotels weltweit, in denen ich bereits zu Gast sein durfte, hebt sich dieses Hotel durch sein umfassendes und exzellentes Gesamtpaket ab. Ein solch vollständiges und überzeugendes Angebot ist in seiner Art selten anzutreffen.
sample_comments.negatives: Nichts

sample_comments.title: Great location and service, but room design and noise issues
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in a Classico Room on the 2nd floor (non-ocean view). The layout was disappointing --- the windows are placed so high that you must stand right in front to see outside, and children can't see out at all. I understand privacy concerns since the room faces a walking street, but curtains would have worked without blocking the view entirely.
The shower also drained very slowly, causing water to spread onto the bathroom floor. 
On our second night, renovation work above our room brought repeated drilling until we complained around 10:40 pm and lighter noise on and off close to midnight. It's listed that maintenance is ongoing, but night-time drilling shouldn't happen in a hotel of this level.

That said, the hotel itself is new, grand, and very centrally located, with excellent reception and concierge service. We could even catch a glimpse of fireworks from our window --- a nice bonus in an otherwise mixed stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Denise,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed review of your stay at La Festa Phu Quoc. We truly appreciate your feedback and your recognition of both the positive and negative aspects of your experience.

sample_comments.title: This is the hotel responsible for trips to the south of Phu Quoc :)
sample_comments.text: This is the hotel where I stayed during my trip to the south of Phu Quoc. The lobby is as beautiful as it looks in the pictures. The room is quite ordinary compared to the lobby, but I think that might be because I stayed in the most basic room. The condition of the room is fine, but above all, the best part is that you can easily access all the tourist attractions in the south for free and travel around, which is fantastic. The Kiss of the Sea performance is free, and the Kiss Bridge is also free. As long as the guests' faces are recognized, everything is available for free, and it's comfortable when going for hopping (it's close to the hopping dock) and enjoying Sunset Town (you can take evening walks). Plus, you can see the fireworks festival from your room every day. It's a fantastic ocean view and fireworks festival view. If I could go back to Phu Quoc, I would just stay here the entire time. I highly recommend it. The pool view is also amazing, and the water quality is quite clean. The breakfast is excellent in itself... If I had to point out a downside, it would be that there were occasionally less friendly staff and that the jacuzzi wasn't extremely clean? But I can overlook all that :)

sample_comments.title: The hotel is new and pretty, but the value for money of the suite room is disappointing.
sample_comments.text:
Advantages
1. The location is the best in Sunset Town.
2. It's a new hotel, so overall it's clean.
3. The cost-performance ratio is good for suites and below.
4. The staff are friendly.
5. The sea view is nice.

Disadvantages
1. There are two buildings, making movement a bit inconvenient.
2. It can be noisy from 5-6 PM and 8-10 PM due to performances.
3. The duplex suite is a bit disappointing... going up and down is too tiring, and the price has risen a lot, making one wonder if it's worth it.

Important to know
Only hotel guests are given entry tickets for the Kiss Bridge.
The Kiss of the Sea show is not included in the entry ticket!
They mentioned at the time of guidance that both were accessible, but that was not the case. If you buy tickets on the spot, it's 1,000,000 VND (about 50,000 KRW)... It's recommended to purchase in advance through a travel platform (about 25,000 KRW).

sample_comments.title: Satisfactory, but still under construction.
sample_comments.text: Located in the center of Sunset Town, I would rate its location as excellent, as it is within a 3-minute walk to the Hon Ton Island cable car station, Kiss of Bridge, and the Kiss of the Sea performance venue. There are also restaurants nearby that can be reached on foot. However, they are currently constructing an additional pool by the beach, so there is noise and the view from the infinity pool is not pleasant. The duplex ocean view room had stains on the fabric sofa and the cushions were sagging. Other than that, all facilities are satisfactory and clean. The staff service is also good. The internet mentions a free ticket for the Kiss of the Sea for guests reviewed on blogs, but that service is not currently provided, and tickets need to be purchased separately. Please make your reservations without any misunderstanding regarding this point. I also came thinking it was complimentary and ended up purchasing it locally. Overall, I do not recommend it for those who want to solve everything within the resort, but I do recommend it for travelers who want to explore Hon Ton Island and the surrounding area on foot.

sample_comments.title: A hotel with good service and an optimal location.
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at La Fiesta for about 4 days.

To be honest, I didn't have high expectations, but the hotel is in such a great location that it was perfect for exploring Phu Quoc and the Sunset Town.

There is a cable car to Hon Thom Island right next to it, a place to see the Kiss of the Sea right behind, a night market street is just a 10-minute walk away, and along the way to the night market, there are countless shops and, behind and in front of the hotel, there are amazing bars and restaurants. And the square is right in front, allowing me to always enjoy a festive atmosphere and a travel vibe.

The staff was always friendly, which was nice. However, the room wasn't particularly pretty or had a good view compared to the price. It's the only hotel that provides sesame oil at the breakfast buffet, making it really great for Koreans (stir-fried pork + white rice or porridge + sesame oil + kimchi is the best combination...).

The private pool and beach right in front of the hotel were also really nice.

Overall, I really liked it, but it seems to be a common issue in Vietnamese resorts; the pillow had a strange musty smell. It smells musty because it didn't dry properly in that humid area.

Even when I asked for a new one, it had a similar smell... If it weren't for that, it would have been perfect!

sample_comments.title: Friendly staff and excellent service.
sample_comments.text:
The front staff's neat and friendly response left a good impression, and it was convenient to have a Korean guide for travelers. Since it was continuously raining, the previous accommodation had a somewhat humid atmosphere even with the air conditioning on, but this hotel maintained dry air in the rooms, making it comfortable. 
There was refreshing lemon water available by the pool, and the warm towels were nice. Even without swimming, it was great to relax by reading a book or enjoying the scenery. 
I was able to use the pool and shower facilities after checking out, which was very useful before my departure time. 
On the day of checkout, I asked the concierge about free admission to Kiss the Bridge, and they were very kind and quickly assisted me, for which I was very grateful. 
Every staff member I encountered at the accommodation was friendly, and they seemed to be attentive to see if there was anything they could help with. 
Overall, it was a place where I had many good experiences.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for your detailed and heartfelt review. We are very pleased to hear that our front desk team, room comfort, poolside amenities, and the availability of Korean-language materials contributed to a memorable stay.

We hope to welcome you again on your next visit to Phu Quoc.

sample_comments.title: I recommend it.
sample_comments.text:
During this trip to Phu Quoc, I visited La Festa Phu Quoc, which I was most looking forward to. To get straight to the point, it was a 'very satisfying' experience that went beyond merely staying at a hotel, as if I had entered a work of art.

1. Overwhelming Mediterranean Vibe from the Entrance

The moment I stepped into the hotel, I was speechless at the colorful exterior and stylish interior that seemed to transport me straight to a village on the Amalfi coast. The high ceilings of the lobby and the view of the blue sea beyond the large windows were enough to fill me with excitement from the moment I checked in.

2. Quality of the Room with Attention to Detail

The room perfectly harmonized modern comfort with vintage Italian charm. Not only was the bedding incredibly cozy, but the view of the sunset town's nightscape and the sea from the terrace was stunningly beautiful, almost unreal. Every detail felt thoughtfully curated, making me feel pampered throughout my stay.

3. Location and Accessibility (Center of Sunset Town)

It is perfectly located for enjoying Phu Quoc's landmark, the Kissing Bridge, and the fireworks. One of the greatest advantages was being able to enjoy a spectacular show nearby the hotel every evening without needing to go far and immerse myself in the vibrant atmosphere of Sunset Town.

4. Attentive Service and Breakfast

The cheerful smiles and thoughtful care of the staff left a lasting impression. They responded promptly and kindly to any requests, ensuring I had no inconvenience at all. Additionally, the breakfast buffet, prepared with fresh ingredients, was excellent in taste and presentation, making me look forward to each morning.

Overall: A hotel I want to visit again, and definitely do not miss watching the fireworks from the terrace or outdoor pool during the evening shows!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Soohyun,

Thank you for choosing La Festa Phu Quoc as one of the highlights of your Phu Quoc journey and for sharing such a beautifully detailed review. We are truly honored to know that your stay felt like stepping into a work of art and that every aspect---from design and room comfort to location and service---created a "very satisfying" experience for you.

Your kind words about our Mediterranean-inspired architecture, attentive team, and breakfast offerings mean a great deal to us. It is especially rewarding to know that the vibrant atmosphere of Sunset Town and the fireworks made your evenings even more memorable.

We sincerely appreciate your heartfelt recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Justin Kim
General Manager

The accommodation is beachfront, with a view of the Kiss bridge, and the fireworks show can be seen from the room's balcony. The staff provides excellent service and speaks English very well. The rooms are luxurious, with complete amenities, worth the price paid. The breakfast is very varied, the pho is delicious, and the banh mi is very tasty.

sample_comments.positives: Near the centre of sunset town! Rooms were spacious and clean. Hotel breakfast and pool was amazing

sample_comments.title: Excellent Experince
sample_comments.text:
A magical experience at La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton!
From the moment we checked in, we were warmly welcomed with smiles and top-notch service. The staff were attentive, friendly, and always ready to go the extra mile to make us feel at home.

Our room was beautifully decorated, clean, and comfortable --- with breathtaking views of the sea and sunset. The bed was incredibly cozy, and the overall design of the hotel was elegant and stylish with a fun Mediterranean vibe.

Breakfast was a daily highlight --- fresh, delicious, and with a great variety of local and international options. The hotel's location is perfect --- right next to the beach and walking distance to the Sun World entertainment park.

Special thanks to the amazing team who made our stay so unforgettable. We truly felt pampered and cared for every step of the way.

We will definitely come back. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Phu Quoc
sample_comments.response:
Dear Sally,

Thank you very much for your thoughtful and detailed review following your recent stay at La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton.

It brings us great joy to know that your experience with us felt truly magical, from the warm welcome at check-in to the attentive hospitality extended throughout your stay. We are especially delighted that you enjoyed the beautifully appointed room, the cozy bedding, and the panoramic views of the sea and sunset that make our location so special.

We're also pleased to hear that the breakfast offerings left a strong impression and that the Mediterranean-inspired design and vibrant surroundings enhanced your overall visit. Your kind words about our Team Members' dedication and service truly mean a lot, and will be shared with the entire team as a source of encouragement and pride.

We are honored to have been a part of your Phu Quoc journey and sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay in the near future

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Location
sample_comments.negatives: Breakfast was too good

sample_comments.title: Wonderful stay!
sample_comments.text:
Had an amazing time at this hotel. Thank you for the surprise birthday cake---it was such a lovely touch! The hotel is spacious with a nice pool and a beautiful private beach. We really enjoyed the fireworks every night at 9:30 PM---a great bonus!

The room was big, clean, and comfortable, and the breakfast was delicious with plenty of variety. Staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

A couple of small downsides: we did notice a few mosquitoes, so be sure to keep the balcony doors closed. We also saw a lizard in the room, which was a bit unexpected.

Overall, it was a great experience, and I'd definitely consider coming back!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Joelle,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us and for sharing such a wonderful and thoughtful review. We're absolutely delighted to know you had an amazing time and that the surprise birthday cake added a special touch to your celebration. Moments like these are what we love to create for our guests.

It's truly heartening to hear your kind words about our spacious facilities, private beach, delicious breakfast, and especially the nightly fireworks - a signature experience we're glad you enjoyed. We're also pleased to know our Team Members made a positive impression with their friendliness and helpfulness throughout your stay.

At the same time, we appreciate you highlighting areas where we could do better. We regret the minor inconveniences caused by mosquitoes and the unexpected visitor in your room. We'll certainly look into this with our housekeeping and pest control teams to further improve our environment and guest comfort.

Once again, thank you for your feedback

sample_comments.title: KING AMALFI OCEAN VIEW SUITE
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is clean, and the staff is very polite. The room is spacious with a living room and separate areas. There are two separate toilets and a shower, as well as a bathtub. When you open the room's terrace, you can see the fireworks, which are very beautiful and convenient. It feels like you are very close to the fireworks. The bathtub is equipped with bath salts that promote blood circulation, and although they don't refill it, adding them to the bathtub makes it very fragrant. 
Room service is good; since it was my birthday, I requested a birthday cake when making the reservation, and upon checking in, I found the cake waiting for me with no extra charge. The hotel offers a wide variety of items for breakfast. The hotel's infinity pool is large and has a sea view, making for beautiful sunset views. 
It's rare to stay in a five-star hotel, so I decided to experience the spa. A 90-minute aromatherapy massage costs only HKD 800, including service charges, which is very affordable compared to five-star hotels in Hong Kong, and I was able to experience five-star service.

We're especially glad the birthday cake and spa experience made your celebration extra special.

We look forward to welcoming you back to La Festa Phu Quoc for another unforgettable getaway.

Also, the Kiss of the Sea performance is paid, but a free performance called the Symphony Museum might be better. sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: The location within Sunset Town made it very convenient to travel to southern tourist attractions by buggy in just 5 minutes. In the evenings, if you have an ocean view room, you can enjoy fireworks from your room, which happen every night at 9 PM, and that was wonderful. The hotel is beautifully designed right from the lobby, and I was very impressed with how lovely every corner was. I attempted to upgrade my room, and the hotel reception staff were incredibly friendly and helpful; particularly, a male staff member named Toan remembered me and made efforts to accommodate my requests, which touched me. It's only a 10-minute walk to the Sunset Town night market, and although the pool requires you to exit to the street on the first floor, it is very large, well-maintained, and right in front of the sea, allowing us to relax and enjoy beautiful sunsets every day. The drawback is that there is some noise due to ongoing construction of the beach and buildings within the resort, and from 1 PM to 5 PM, the sunlight is too strong for swimming as there is no shade. The advantages are the excellent location, clean breakfast, and the affiliated facilities.

sample_comments.text: I really hope you get to visit this accommodation at least once in your life. It's newly built, so the facilities are not just clean but almost brand new, which is great!! There's also a supermarket on the third floor, and the prices are inexpensive, which is nice. That supermarket is also brand new, so I highly recommend it. If you take pictures by the pool with the sunset beach as a background, you'll definitely get the perfect life shot, so be sure to take some!!! They serve wood-fired pizza for breakfast, which is incredibly delicious, so don't miss it. There is an impressive variety of breakfast foods, leaving you in awe. The pho is so good that I don't even feel like going out to buy pho. You might be skeptical because I'm writing only good things, but it was really, really great. It's been about three months since I visited, and it's the only place I want to go back to among the overseas travel destinations I went to this yearㅠ I'm constantly checking flight tickets whenever I have some free time.. You must visit!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Jisoo,

Warm greetings from La Festa Phu Quoc!

Thank you so much for your heartfelt and glowing review. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed every aspect of your stay, from our pristine facilities and delicious welcome drinks to our friendly Team Members and exciting resort amenities. Your vivid description of the sunset pool photos, wood-fired pizza, and flavorful pho truly captures the vibrant spirit of La Festa Phu Quoc. We feel honored to be one of your most cherished overseas destinations this year, and we eagerly await your return for more unforgettable memories!

With warmest wishes,
Justin Kim
General Manager

sample_comments.title: The most worthwhile hotel to stay at on Phu Quoc Island, without exception.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located in Sunset Town on Phu Quoc Island, surrounded by pleasant scenery that makes one feel like they are by the Mediterranean coast of Southern Europe. The hotel is very well designed, resembling the clock tower of St. Mark's Square, and the room decor has a high artistic sense! The staff are very friendly and will provide you with all the information you want to know!

On the night we checked in, our sea view terrace room offered a full view of an impressive firework display that lasted for several minutes, leaving a lasting impression!

The interior of the hotel room is also very cozy, featuring a separate bathtub and shower, a comfortable king-size bed, and an Italian coffee machine, all with excellent sound insulation!

Lastly, the hotel's children's club comes highly recommended for parents traveling with kids. Although it is located at the bottom of the hotel, it has play equipment that kids love and offers drawing activities, allowing the children to enjoy themselves for as long as they like!

Next time I return to Phu Quoc, I will definitely stay at this hotel again because it truly feels fantastic!

sample_comments.title: The best hotel in the southern region.
sample_comments.text: I stayed for two nights, and if I had stayed for one night, I would have regretted it. First of all, the hotel is neat, and there are many Koreans around. It seems to be a good fit for Koreans who like cleanliness. Most tourist attractions are within walking distance. The free entrance tickets included with the hotel stay were also nice. It's convenient to catch a Grab. It's a good hotel for taking photos. I booked it because the swimming pool looked pretty, and it really was nice. The breakfast was also clean. Someone posted on their blog that the French toast is a must-try, but that's more of a personal preference. It wasn't really to my taste. Having tried breakfast for two days, I found the variety of bread to be delicious. They also served mango, which I enjoyed. The ice cream was tasty as well. I recommend it if you're going to the south. I suggest staying for more than one night; one night would feel a bit lacking.

sample_comments.title: DO NOT COME TO THIS HOTEL, TOTALLY A REALLY BIG DISAPPOINTMENT!
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is an absolute disaster from start to finish. My experience was so appalling that I feel compelled to warn everyone: DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY OR TIME HERE!
Here's a breakdown of why this place deserves ZERO stars, if that were possible:
1. APPALLINGLY SLOW, DISCRIMINATORY, AND UTTERLY UNPROFESSIONAL SERVICE! The incompetence here is mind-blowing. Guests arriving HOURS after me were somehow able to get their rooms earlier, without any additional payment. It's disgustingly clear that this hotel PRIVILEGES FOREIGNERS and has absolutely no regard for Vietnamese guests. My friend even upgraded to the supposedly top-tier Dolce room (like "Presidential Suite," of which there's only ONE!), and they had the audacity to make us wait TWO HOURS for it to be "prepared," promising a call when ready. Of course, NO CALL EVER CAME! We had to chase them down to find out it was finally available. The exact same thing happened with my own room - I was constantly the one having to inquire if it was ready; apparently, proactively informing guests is beyond the capabilities of the reception staff. And the final insult? The "Presidential Suite" is advertised with a fruit platter and wine bottle, but there was NOTHING in the room upon arrival! We had to call their incompetent reception AGAIN to request what should have been there in the first place. This level of unprofessionalism is simply UNACCEPTABLE!
2. NO BASIC HOSPITALITY - WHERE IS THE DOORMAN?! Forget any expectation of basic service. There was NEVER a doorman to be seen at the front entrance. We were left to struggle with opening doors and hauling our own luggage from the taxi. This isn't some budget guesthouse; it's a supposed Hilton! The lack of such a fundamental amenity is frankly EMBARRASSING.
3. OVERPRICED AND UNDERWHELMING - A SHAME TO THE HILTON BRAND! The price they charge for this pathetic excuse for a hotel is an absolute JOKE. It is in NO WAY worth the value of what you receive, especially considering it carries the Hilton name. The room was TINY and inconvenient. The only positive aspect is that it's new, but that's where the positives END. The room does not look like the pictures online. It was damp, unclean, and clearly a room they deem acceptable for Vietnamese customers, showing their utter lack of care for cleanliness when it comes to local guests.
4. DISASTROUS FOOD AND A RIDICULOUS BREAKFAST EXPERIENCE! The food here is a culinary ABOMINATION! Their attempts at "fusion" are a complete and utter failure. And the breakfast? BORING, with a pathetic selection and TERRIBLE quality. Just look at the photo I've attached of their so-called "Big Benedict" - it's a complete mockery of the dish! Furthermore, despite arriving at the restaurant well outside of peak breakfast hours (as you can see from the photo taken at the entrance), we were made to wait an unreasonably long time to be seated. And the absurdity doesn't end there! After getting our food, our table remained completely uncleared and un-set for over TEN MINUTES! There wasn't even cutlery on the table, as if the restaurant's "signature" is expecting guests to eat with their bare hands!
5. The internet connection is really slow, and gues what, if you want to have faster connection, please PAY!!
6. And the final insult, the hotel can kick you out of the room whenever they can, without any reason or explanation!!!
This was my first and, without a shadow of a doubt, my LAST time ever considering this horrific excuse for a hotel. PLEASE, FOR YOUR OWN SAKE, DO NOT CHOOSE THIS HOTEL! You will be met with slow, discriminatory service, substandard rooms, terrible food, and a complete lack of professionalism. Save your money and book elsewhere - anywhere would be better than this absolute disappointment.

寝室２階のメゾネット、スーツケース移動が面倒

NHKチャンネルあるが、断片的にしか映らない。
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Hisatoshi,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your stay at La Festa Phu Quoc.

We regret that the maisonette layout and certain room features did not fully meet your expectations. Your comments have been noted and shared with the Team Members for review.

We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a more comfortable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Justin Kim
General Manager

sample_comments.title: 快適に過ごせるホテル
sample_comments.text:
とても綺麗でプールやビーチも近く、ナイトマーケットや近隣の散策にも便利なホテルでした。
お部屋のメモに，前の落書きがあったのが残念。
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. 綾子,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience and for awarding us an 8/10 overall. We're delighted that you found your room very clean and enjoyed our convenient proximity to the pool, beach, and night market, perfect for those leisurely evening strolls.

Please accept our sincere apologies for the scribbles you discovered in the room's memo pad. We strive for meticulous attention to detail, and your comment has been shared with housekeeping.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back to La Festa Phu Quoc soon for an even more seamless and comfortable stay.

Warm regards,
Justin Kim
General Manager

sample_comments.title: オススメしたいホテル
sample_comments.text: オーシャンビューのお部屋に泊まりました。2階でしたが花火がお部屋からばっちり見れて大満足です。また、朝食も毎日少しずつ内容が変わり大変満足でした。
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. MAI,

We are truly delighted to receive your wonderful five-star review! It brings us great joy to know that your stay at La Festa Phu Quoc exceeded your expectations. Your generous feedback motivates us to maintain the highest standards of service and excellence.

We eagerly anticipate the opportunity to welcome you back for another exceptional experience.

Best regards,
Justin Kim
General Manager

secondary.description_full:
La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton

Hàng loạt dịch vụ được La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton cung cấp đảm bảo tất cả du khách tận dụng được tối đa kỳ nghỉ của họ. Dễ dàng cập nhật mọi thông tin liên lạc của quý khách với Wi-Fi miễn phí của khách sạn.
Dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng có thể hỗ trợ các nhu cầu của quý khách. Cho những kỳ nghỉ dài hơn hoặc bất cứ khi nào quý khách cần, dịch vụ giặt là giữ cho những bộ trang phục du lịch yêu thích của quý khách luôn sạch sẽ và sẵn sàng.
Các tiện ích trong phòng bao gồm dịch vụ tại phòng và dọn phòng hằng ngày, vì vậy bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Khách sạn cấm hút thuốc hoàn toàn để đảm bảo bầu không khí trong lành.
Các phòng tại La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton được thiết kế để mang đến sự thoải mái. Cho sự thoải mái cho quý khách, một số phòng tại khách sạn được trang bị điều hòa. Các phòng tại La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton có các đặc điểm thiết kế đặc biệt như một ban công hoặc sân hiên. Các tiện nghi giải trí trong phòng có sẵn trong một số phòng và bao gồm phát trực tuyến video trong phòng và ti-vi.
Khách sạn cũng cung cấp nước đóng chai, tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống và trà hòa tan cho khách trong một số phòng. Biết rằng đồ dùng phòng tắm đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc tăng mức độ hài lòng của khách, khách sạn cung cấp khăn tắm, áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa trong một số phòng chọn lọc.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Bắt đầu mỗi buổi sáng tại La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton với bữa sáng hấp dẫn được phục vụ trong khuôn viên. Một loạt các lựa chọn ăn uống tiện lợi và ngon miệng đang chờ quý khách tại khách sạn, bất cứ khi quý khách quý khách cảm thấy đói. Một khi đến đó, hãy nhớ ghé qua quán bar để tận hưởng một số thú vui ban đêm ngay tại chỗ.
La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton cho phép quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian của mình! Khi ở đó, quý khách có thể tận hưởng vô số cơ sở vật chất giải trí được cung cấp cho tất cả khách nghỉ. Chiều chuộng và nuông chiều bản thân với một chuyến ghé qua spa.
Bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của quý khách đúng điệu bằng việc tắm mát trong bể bơi. Khám phá trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn để giữ sức khỏe và săn chắc trong kỳ nghỉ.

childPolicies.policy: Trẻ sơ sinh 0-5 tuổi [bao gồm cả bé 5 tuổi]
childPolicies.description: Lưu trú miễn phí khi sử dụng giường có sẵn. Lưu ý, nếu quý khách cần cũi em bé, việc này có thể phát sinh thêm phụ phí và phụ thuộc vào tình trạng thực tế.

childPolicies.policy: Trẻ em 6-17 tuổi [bao gồm cả bé 17 tuổi]
childPolicies.description: Ở miễn phí nếu sử dụng giường có sẵn.

extrabedPolicies.description: Giường phụ tùy thuộc vào loại phòng bạn chọn, xin vui lòng kiểm tra thông tin phòng để biết thêm chi tiết.

policyNotes: Hút thuốc: La Festa Phú Quốc là khu nghỉ dưỡng không hút thuốc. Không hút thuốc trong phòng hoặc ban công (có khu vực hút thuốc riêng). Phí hút thuốc: 2.000.000 VND mỗi lần.

Trẻ em dưới 13 tuổi được ở miễn phí khi ngủ chung giường với bố mẹ. Khách từ 13 tuổi trở lên được xem là người lớn và sẽ phải trả phụ phí người ở thêm. Trẻ em từ 5 tuổi trở xuống được miễn phí bữa sáng, trẻ em từ 6 đến 12 tuổi được giảm 50% giá bữa sáng.

Chính sách phụ thu khách ở thêm: áp dụng từ ngày 01 Tháng 4 2025
[Phụ thu người lớn]
1.290.000 VND mỗi người mỗi đêm (giá chưa bao gồm thuế và phí dịch vụ)
[Trẻ em ở thêm]
6-12 tuổi: 299.000 VND mỗi người mỗi đêm (giá chưa bao gồm thuế và phí dịch vụ)
Trẻ em dưới 6 tuổi: miễn phí
Nôi em bé có sẵn theo yêu cầu (miễn phí)

embedding_text:
La Festa Phu Quoc, Curio Collection by Hilton - khách sạn 5.0 sao tại Đảo Phú Quốc.
Địa chỉ: Sunset Town, An Thới, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam.
Hãy để chuyến đi của quý khách có một khởi đầu tuyệt vời khi ở lại khách sạn này, nơi có Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại An Thới của Đảo Phú Quốc, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 5 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi ngoài trời, phòng tập và nhà hàng ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bình chữa cháy, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi [trẻ em], Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bồn ngâm chân, Bữa sáng [tự chọn], Bữa sáng trong phòng, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, CLB trẻ em, Các phương tiện dành cho khách khuyết tật, Cách phương tiện công cộng 200 mét, Có cung cấp hóa đơn, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn, Dép đi trong nhà, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ báo thức, Dịch vụ giặt là, Dịch vụ phòng, Dịch vụ thanh toán không sử dụng tiền mặt, Dịch vụ ủi đồ, Dọn phòng hằng ngày, Giải trí trong khuôn viên.
Điểm đánh giá 9.1/10 dựa trên 3940 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Địa điểm, Bữa sáng, Độ sạch sẽ, Hướng nhìn từ phòng, Bể bơi, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Không khí.
Các loại phòng: TWIN BALCONE OCEAN VIEW ROOM; KING DOLCE VITA SUITE; KING AMALFI OCEAN VIEW SUITE (King Amalfi Ocean View Suite); KING BALCONE OCEAN VIEW ROOM (King Balcone Ocean View Room); KING CAPRI TERRACE ROOM (King Capri Terrace Room); King Deluxe Ocean View Room; KING AMALFI SUITE; King Sorrento Sinfonia Ocean View Suite.
Gần: Cáp treo Hòn Thơm, Bệnh xá Quân Dân Y Phú Quốc, Chùa Sùng Đức, Nhà tù Phú Quốc, Cảng An Thới, Department of Chemistry Bar - JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa.
